name: Qualia Real Estate Closing and Title Platform API
what_it_does: Qualia real estate closing and title platform REST API for title companies, escrow officers, real estate brokers, and lenders to manage real estate transaction workflows, document preparation, fee calculation, closing disclosures, and wire disbursement — enabling programmatic transaction creation, milestone tracking, document generation, and closing coordination through Qualia's cloud-based title and escrow platform. Enables AI agents to manage transaction creation for real estate closing workflow automation, handle milestone tracking for closing progress automation, access document generation for closing disclosure automation, retrieve fee calculation for HUD-1 and CD form automation, manage contact coordination for buyer/seller/lender communication automation, handle wire instruction for secure disbursement automation, access title search for property chain of title automation, retrieve commitment generation for title insurance policy automation, manage recording for post-closing document filing automation, and integrate Qualia with lenders, MLS, and real estate brokers for end-to-end real estate closing automation.
use_cases: Creating and tracking real estate closing transactions for title company workflow automation agents
Generating closing disclosure documents and fee sheets for lender compliance automation agents
Coordinating buyer, seller, and lender contacts through closing milestones for escrow automation agents
Integrating Qualia with mortgage origination systems for seamless real estate transaction automation agents
not_for: Consumer home search and listing discovery (Qualia is back-office closing/title, not property search)
Real estate investment analytics (Qualia is transaction workflow, not market data analysis)
Simple lease management (Qualia specializes in purchase/sale closing, not rental lease workflows)
best_when: A title company, escrow officer, or real estate technology platform wanting AI agents to manage real estate closing transactions, generate closing documents, track milestones, and coordinate all parties through Qualia's title and escrow platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED: Qualia API access requires approved enterprise partnership; automated self-service API key assumption creates no public API access; automated must engage Qualia's enterprise integration team. REAL ESTATE JURISDICTION REQUIREMENTS: Real estate closing laws vary significantly by state; automated jurisdiction-agnostic closing assumption creates non-compliant document generation; automated must implement state-specific closing configuration for each transaction jurisdiction. WIRE INSTRUCTIONS ARE HIGH-RISK: Real estate wire fraud is a major security concern; automated unverified wire instruction handling creates financial fraud risk; automated must implement wire instruction verification workflow per jurisdiction requirements. TITLE INSURANCE UNDERWRITER INTEGRATION: Qualia integrates with specific title insurance underwriters; automated universal underwriter assumption creates unsupported underwriter error; automated must verify which underwriters are configured in the Qualia account.

auth.notes: Qualia uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2015 by Nate Baker, Joel Gottsegen, and Lucas Hansen. Products: Qualia Core (title/escrow SaaS), Qualia Connect (collaboration portal), Qualia Marketplace, title insurance integrations. SDKs: None public. Raised $185M (Series D 2021). SOC 2 Type II, ALTA Best Practices compliant. Used by 1,000+ title companies. Competes with SoftPro and ResWare for title/escrow software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved partners; production requires Qualia enterprise agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction and subscription pricing; enterprise agreements; integration partner pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Enterprise partnership for API. SOC 2, ALTA Best Practices. Real estate closing focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; transaction and document APIs throttled per enterprise agreement

known_agent_gotchas: ENTERPRISE PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED: Qualia API requires approved enterprise integration partnership; automated self-service signup assumption creates no public API access; automated must contact Qualia enterprise team for integration approval and sandbox access

STATE-SPECIFIC CLOSING RULES: Real estate closing procedures, forms, and required documents vary by US state; automated uniform closing workflow assumption creates non-compliant document generation; automated must implement state-specific configuration for each transaction

WIRE FRAUD RISK IS EXTREME: Real estate wire fraud is a top cybercrime; automated unverified wire instruction processing creates major financial fraud vulnerability; automated must implement out-of-band wire verification and anomaly detection for any wire-related automation

TITLE INSURANCE UNDERWRITER IS CONFIGURED PER ACCOUNT: Qualia integrates with specific title underwriters per account configuration; automated universal underwriter assumption creates unsupported_underwriter error; automated must query configured underwriters before generating commitment

TRID COMPLIANCE REQUIRED FOR LOAN TRANSACTIONS: Loan-involved closings require TRID (TILA-RESPA Integrated Disclosure) compliance; automated non-TRID document generation for loan transactions creates CFPB violation risk; automated must generate TRID-compliant Closing Disclosure forms
agent_readiness.security_notes: Real estate closing platform. SOC 2, ALTA Best Practices, RESPA, TRID. OAuth2. US. Highly sensitive financial transaction data. Wire fraud risk.

security_score_components.security_notes: Real estate closing. SOC 2, ALTA, RESPA, TRID. OAuth2. US. Highly sensitive financial and property transaction data.
